THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KABLY, NADIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO NOTHING. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUSTAIN HER BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF NADIA KABLY IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SUSAN GARVIN (BUSINESS EXECUTION CONSULTANT) VIA ZOOM. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF NADIA KABLY ZOOM APPEARANCE ON TODAY'S TRIAL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT BOTH ORALLY STIPULATE TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
